title: Better Fairy Souls | Hypixel Skyblock
description: A improved Fairy Soul helper for Hypixel Skyblock, featuring per-profile logging, quest-log sync, and extensive configuration options.
body: **Better Fairy Souls** is an improved Fairy Soul helper for **Hypixel Skyblock**. I made this because non of the large Skyblock Mods have a proper one. It features: - Per profile tracking - In-Game synchronization using the ``/questlog`` command - Configuration options for virtually anything - Markers informing you about confusing placements ...and anything else you would want a Fairy Soul helper to do. For any further assistance or troubleshooting, please reach out to our [support server](https://discord.gg/KTF3Wsk85G) on Discord.
